response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, particularly with geospatial data (GISCollective) and low-latency systems (Dunnhumby), which aligns well with the role's requirements. However, his primary expertise lies in Node.js, JavaScript, and Dlang rather than C++/Rust, and his recent work focuses on web/mobile applications with limited exposure to routing/navigation data pipelines. His adaptability and problem-solving approach are strong positives.
strengths: Proven experience with geospatial data processing (GISCollective platform)
Strong background in distributed systems and low-latency applications (Dunnhumby, Sociomantic)
Demonstrated expertise in automation, testing, and DevOps (CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes)
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++/Rust or modern routing data pipelines
No clear evidence of working with navigation systems or routing algorithms
Recent work heavily focused on web/mobile stacks rather than backend geospatial systems
